turns.user_message: I think my boss doesn't trust me. They want to approve every email, every decision. It's suffocating and I don't know how to handle it.
I feel like you're just repeating what I say back to me. Can't you actually tell me what to do?
Yeah, this thing with a micromanaging supervisor is never going to get better.
I don't know. It just keeps getting worse.

I don't know. It just keeps getting worse.
